meaning: n.夏洛来牛(一种原产法国Monts du Charollais的肉用大白牛),夏洛来牛种
examples: From there we could look across the meadows of creamy Charolais cattle to the wild sea beyond.
Charolais cattle to large size, growth speed, lean meat, and high feed conversion rate of the civilized world.
To the north, on the rue du Charolais, the daycare center signifies its presence with its volume projected out onto the street.
America's top five cattle breeds are Angus from Scotland, Hereford from England, Limousin from France, Simmenthal from Switzerland, and Charolais from France.
